titleStmt.title: SII 27.110: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 110. (A.R. No. 20 of 1938-39.) ŚRĪRAṄGAM, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK, TRICHINOPOLY DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the second prākāra in Raṅganātha temple.

It refers to mahāmaṇḍalēśvara, Vīrapratāpa Dēvarāya as ruling the country and records a gift of two villages viz., Koḍiyāla in Teṅkare Rājagambhīra-vaḷanāḍu and Chiṟudayūr in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu by Aṇṇa-Chayuḍappa son of Ādityadēva and grandson of Yēchimarasa of Vaśishṭha-gōtra and Āśvalāyana-sūtra, to god Raṅganātha for daily offerings and a perpetual lamp and for the celebration of a car festival in the month of Bhādrapada and Uttarāshāḍha-nakshatra, the day of the natal star of Ādityadēva. A gift of an elephant and thirty cows was also made. These were made over to Uttama-nambi the officer in charge of the temple's treasury. This is a copy of a Tamil record (A.R.S.I.E., App. B. No. 7 of 1938-39).
Its is dated Śaka 1355, Pramādi, Pushya ba. 6, Friday corresponding to 1434 A.D., January 1.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī manmahāmaṁḍalēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa dēvarāyaru prithuvi rājyaṁ gaie śakābda 1355 pramādi saṁvatsarada puṣya ba 6 gulū śrī raṁganāthadēvara bhaṁḍārakke karttaraha Uttamanaṁbiyarige Ādityadēva gaḷa maga Aṁṇacauḍappagaḷu koṭṭa dharmma paṭṭeya vaśiṣṭagōtrada Āśvalāyana sūtrada yēcimarasara maga naṁma taṁde Ādityadēvagaḷa hesaralū śrīraṁganāthadēvarige Oṁdu Avasarakke ghṛta phala śarkarādi miśravāgi Ayidu harivāṇa nayivēdyava cittaysi tiruppaṇi maḍaṁguvāga saṁbātaḷiya harivāṇa Oṁdū Āṟu Appa Arōgaṇeya citayisuva deśau Oṁdu naṁdāveḷakka yeraḍu daṁḍegeU Oṁdu naṁdādīvigeU bhādrapada mūsalū naṁma taṁdē Ādityadēva Oḍeyāra janma nakṣatrada Uttarāṣaḍha nakṣatradalū śrīraṁganātha dēvaru citayisuva rathautsāḍa tirunāḷigeU dhārāpūrvakavāgi koṭṭadu tiricirāpaḷḷiya cāvaḍiya teṁkare rājagaṁbhīra vaḷanāḍa koḍiyālada grāma Oṁdu rājarājavaḷanāḍa maḷanāḍa
muṟiya ciṟudayūra grāmavoṁdu Ubhayaṁ grāma yeraḍu 1 viḷaku koṭṭadu hasu mūvattu Ādityadēva Oḍeyara hesaralū naḍuva tiru nāḷaya hō Utsāhaka sēvege koṭṭa Āne Oṁdu Aṁtu yellavanū Ācaṁdrārkavāgi Anubhaviśikoṁḍu Avasara tirunāḷu naṁdavane daṁṭe naṁdādīpavanu yivellavanū Ācaṁdrārkavāgi naḍasauḷavaru . svadattāṁ vāyō harēta vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhivaruṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . dāna pālanayōrmadhyē dānāśrēyōnu pālanaṁ . dānā sorgamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ ..
Digital edition of SII 27.110 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
